name: Young
title: Shutters, Blinds & Curtains in Young | Luxe Shutters
metaDescription: Shutters, blinds & curtains in Young NSW. Free in-home measurement, custom products, expert installation by Luxe Shutters. Call 1800-465-893.
heroTagline: Quality shutters and blinds for the Cherry Capital
description: From heritage homes to new builds, Luxe Shutters serves Young and the surrounding South West Slopes with custom shutters, blinds, curtains, and outdoor screens. We provide free in-home consultations and professional installation for every project.
highlights: Experience with heritage and period homes
Custom solutions for unique window shapes

faqs.q: Can you work with heritage windows in Young?
faqs.a: Yes! We specialise in custom solutions for heritage homes. Our shutters can be made to fit arched, round, and non-standard window shapes common in Young's older homes.
Plantation shutters are our most requested product in Young, followed by curtains and zipscreens for outdoor entertaining areas.

faqs.q: Do you service Boorowa and Harden too?
faqs.a: Yes, we cover Young and all surrounding towns including Boorowa, Harden-Murrumburrah, and Cowra.
